item.name: Triceratops Horn
item.description: A rough-hewn horn of petrified bone that, when blown, emits a somber tone that summons a lumbering triceratops.

mount.name: Triceratops
mount.action: Summon forth your triceratops seemingly from a page right out of prehistory.
mount.description: In defiance of its bulk, this prehistoric horned beast has been rendered capable of flight courtesy of its saddle. Employing Ronkan ingenuity, the singular contraption was modified from an artifact discovered within ancient ruins by the moogle Nutsy, fearless leader of the clan of her namesake.
mount.tooltip:
Can you please go and steal
a dinosaur egg for us?
- Vath Braveheart
